title: EnvironmentSettings
description: Persistent UI environment for the Berreman Optical Constructor (Spec 0022, Part J §J.6-J.9). Added to the §A.7 schema family and validated on load with JsonSchema.Net. Hand/LLM-inspectable user config — JSON, never .binz (binding rule 4). The favorites board's Layer/OpticalSystem fragments are §A.7 physics shapes left intentionally permissive here (mirroring the project schema's permissive physics $defs); only the favorites structure and the J.7/J.8 preference/layout/theme shapes are constrained. Schema versioning/migration is out of scope (J.6 item 3): a differing schemaVersion fails the const and the app falls back to built-in defaults.

schemaVersion.description: The single shipped env-schema version. A differing value is a validation error, not a migration trigger (J.6 item 3).

favorites.description: Named, grouped pins of frequently used Layers, materialEntry/sourceSpec ids, and OpticalSystem fragments (J.6).

chartPalette.description: Configurable chart color palette surfaced to Part H (J.8). The palette implementation is Part H; this carries only the configured colors.

language.description: The selected UI language (Spec 0026 Part I §I.2.1). Persisted and restored on next launch; defaults to English. A fieldless DU serialized as a bare string. EN and RU ship; a further language is added by editing strings.json (no third language ships).

unitOfMeasure.description: Boundary unit-of-measure vocabulary (Part D, D.1). A display/IO label only; the stored magnitude is always canonical SI.

theme.description: Theme selection (J.8). A fieldless DU serialized as a bare string.

language.description: UI language selection (Spec 0026 Part I §I.2). A fieldless DU serialized as a bare string. EN and RU ship; the strings.json mechanism supports adding a further language by editing the file.

dockSide.description: A panel's dock edge (J.8). Center is the fill region.

panel.description: Panel id (stack, materials, sources, chart, results).

size.description: Size along the dock axis (device-independent pixels).

solverParameters.description: The engine's own SolverParameters (Solvers.fs:15). Part J defines no parallel solver-config record (J.7).

numberOfReflections.description: Convergence control: reflections used for a thick substrate plate.

favoritePin.description: One pinned favorite, the FSharp.SystemTextJson adjacent-tag shape {Case, Fields}. Case selects a reused engine Layer/OpticalSystem fragment (by value) or a materialEntry/sourceSpec id (string). The Fields payload is left permissive — the §A.7 physics shapes are validated by the project schema, mirrored permissively here.
